onboarding.title: Welcome to LlamaMail
onboarding.subtitle: Set your workspace preferences in under a minute.
onboarding.item_use_without_account: Use the app with or without an account
onboarding.minimize_to_tray_description: Keep LlamaMail running in the background.
onboarding.change_later_in_settings: You can change any of these options later in Settings.

step.signin_subtitle: Enter details or connect with OAuth

hero.subtitle: We will auto-detect settings, verify auth, and save everything securely.

provider.choose_subtitle: Select the provider first. We will adapt sign-in automatically.
provider.custom_description: Use autodiscover and manual server setup when needed.
provider.icloud_description: Use your Apple ID email and an app-specific password.

credentials.oauth_subtitle: We will open your browser, verify access, and add the account.
credentials.password_subtitle: We will autodiscover your account, verify IMAP/SMTP, and add the account.

oauth.secure_signin_subtitle: Click Connect And Add Account to open your provider login page.
oauth.waiting_subtitle: Complete sign-in in your browser to continue.

advanced_setup.title: Advanced manual setup
advanced_setup.subtitle: Custom autodiscover failed. Configure host, port, and security manually.

advanced_credentials.title: Advanced credentials
advanced_credentials.description: Set a global username and optional per-protocol overrides. Empty per-protocol fields fall back to the global value.

modules.title: Include modules
modules.description: Choose what this account should appear in and sync.

error.imap_smtp_required: IMAP and SMTP settings are required.
error.oauth_google_microsoft_only: OAuth sign-in is currently supported for Google and Microsoft only.
error.oauth_provider_not_configured: Provider '{{provider}}' OAuth setup is not configured yet.
error.provider_signin_missing_email: Provider sign-in did not return an email address.
error.provider_auto_config_failed_use_custom: This provider could not be configured automatically. Use custom provider for manual setup.
error.autodiscover_incomplete_manual: Autodiscover did not return complete settings. Configure host, port, and security manually.
error.verify_discovered_custom: Could not verify discovered settings: {{message}}. Review host, port, and security manually.
error.provider_not_enabled: Provider '{{provider}}' is not enabled in this build.
error.enter_username_app_password: Enter a username and app password, or set protocol-specific credentials in Advanced settings.
error.enter_username_password: Enter a username and password, or set protocol-specific credentials in Advanced settings.

auth.oauth_preferred: This provider usually requires OAuth sign-in (2FA/passkeys supported) or an app password. Direct password login may be blocked.
auth.app_password_failed: App-specific password authentication failed. Check your account email/username and regenerate the app password, then retry.
auth.app_password_required: This provider usually requires an app-specific password for IMAP/SMTP. Generate one in provider security settings and retry.
